2604.10212.title: Relational Probing: LM-to-Graph Adaptation for Financial Prediction
2604.10212.paper_summary: Language models can be used to identify relationships between financial entities in text. However, while structured output mechanisms exist, prompting-based pipelines still incur autoregressive decoding costs and decouple graph construction from downstream optimization. We propose \emph{Relational Probing}, which replaces the standard language-model head with a relation head that induces a relational graph directly from language-model hidden states and is trained jointly with the downstream task model for stock-trend prediction. This approach both learns semantic representations and preserves the strict structure of the induced relational graph. It enables language-model outputs to go beyond text, allowing them to be reshaped into task-specific formats for downstream models. To enhance reproducibility, we provide an operational definition of small language models (SLMs): models that can be fine-tuned end-to-end on a single 24GB GPU under specified batch-size and sequence-length settings. Experiments use Qwen3 backbones (0.6B/1.7B/4B) as upstream SLMs and compare against a co-occurrence baseline. Relational Probing yields consistent performance improvements at competitive inference cost.
2604.10212.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型可以用來識別文本中金融實體之間的關係。<lb/>然而，儘管存在結構化輸出機制，基於提示的管道仍然會產生自回歸解碼成本，並將圖形構建與下游優化解耦。<lb/>我們提出了\emph{關係探測}，它用一個關係頭取代標準的語言模型頭，該關係頭直接從語言模型的隱藏狀態中誘導出一個關係圖，並與下游任務模型共同訓練以進行股票趨勢預測。<lb/>這種方法既學習語義表示，又保留了誘導關係圖的嚴格結構。<lb/>它使語言模型的輸出超越文本，允許它們被重塑為下游模型的任務特定格式。<lb/>為了增強可重現性，我們提供了小型語言模型（SLMs）的操作定義：可以在指定的批次大小和序列長度設置下，在單個24GB GPU上進行端到端微調的模型。<lb/>實驗使用Qwen3骨幹（0.6B/1.7B/4B）作為上游SLMs，並與共現基準進行比較。<lb/>關係探測在具有競爭性推理成本的情況下，產生了一致的性能提升。
2604.10212.author: Yingjie Niu et.al.
2604.10212.authors: Yingjie Niu, Changhong Jin, Rian Dolphin, Ruihai Dong
